perf.regime: memory-bound row-wise reduce; ~4-6× over two sequential RMSNorm launches. Win is one kernel/one pass.

notes: Portable Triton. One program per token row normalizes both latents; BLOCK_D1/BLOCK_D2 are next_pow2(d), num_warps derived. Wave-size (32 vs 64) is not load-bearing (row-wise reduce).
